error.signature: BillingError: Image input token count exceeded budget
error.regex: (image.*token.*cost|vision.*expensive|multimodal.*billing|image.*input.*tokens|BillingError:\ Image\ input\ token\ count\ exceeded\ budget)

verdict.summary: High-resolution images consume many tokens, causing unexpected API costs.

dead_ends.action: Send full-resolution images assuming tokens are cheap
dead_ends.why_fails: A single 4K image can use 10K+ tokens at high detail.

dead_ends.action: Convert images to base64 to reduce token count
dead_ends.why_fails: Base64 encoding does not affect token count; it is how images are transmitted.

workarounds.action: Resize images to the minimum resolution needed
workarounds.how: Resize to 512x512 or use detail:"low" for thumbnails

workarounds.action: Use detail parameter to control image token usage
workarounds.how: detail:"low" uses 85 tokens; detail:"high" uses up to 1445 per tile
